docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,240.80 FILED BY KUBARA, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, EARL DBA SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLD CORP. WILLIAM II, BURL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUBARA, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, EARL DBA SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLD CORP.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUBARA, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM II, BURL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-14-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, EARL DBA SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLD CORP.
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAIL RETURNED (SC-100): NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-30-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EARL PEARSON WHO WAS SERVED BY CERTIFIED MAIL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BURL WILLIAM II WHO WAS NOT SERVED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERKS: S. VANTREE AND J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO BURL WILLIAM II BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-30-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUBARA, JESUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEARSON, EARL DBA SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLD CORP. $6,240.80 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,345.80, DEFENDANT BURL WILLIAM DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, EARL DBA SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLD CORP.
